steps.title: Find the x-intercept and y-intercept
steps.content:
To find the x-intercept (where $y=0$), substitute $y=0$ into $7x+2y=-31$:
$$7x + 2(0) = -31$$
$$7x = -31$$
$$x = -\frac{31}{7}$$
So $a = -\frac{31}{7}$.

To find the y-intercept (where $x=0$), substitute $x=0$:
$$7(0) + 2y = -31$$
$$2y = -31$$
$$y = -\frac{31}{2}$$
So $b = -\frac{31}{2}$.

steps.title: Compute the ratio b/a
steps.content:
Now calculate $\frac{b}{a}$:
$$\frac{b}{a} = \frac{-31/2}{-31/7}$$
Multiply by the reciprocal:
$$= \frac{-31}{2} \cdot \frac{7}{-31}$$
Cancel the common factor $-31$:
$$= \frac{7}{2}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
